title: Automations between Boards

posts.author: katiewlenderfit (Katie Walker)
posts.cookedHtml:
I want to be able to create an automation where when status changes in one item, it’s linked item in the other board will change status

I hoped this forum below would have my solution, but mirroring columns won’t work because the statuses for each of the items is different in the two boards.

2-way automated status changes between linked boards
